description: 180 Jeopardy questions exploring birthday balloons, hats, streamers, imagery, and symbols through visual literacy, symbolism, and semiotics

1_elementary.description: Simple, visual, age-appropriate questions about common birthday symbols

questions.clue: This round, colorful object floats in the air at birthday parties
questions.answer: What is a balloon?

questions.clue: You wear this cone-shaped decoration on your head at a party
questions.answer: What is a party hat?

questions.clue: This long, colorful decoration is hung on walls and doorways
questions.answer: What is a streamer?

questions.clue: Tiny colored paper pieces thrown in the air during celebrations
questions.answer: What is confetti?

questions.clue: This bright color is often used on balloons and decorations at happy parties
questions.answer: What is yellow?

questions.clue: When you see balloons, you know a celebration is this
questions.answer: What is happy?

questions.clue: A string attached to a balloon helps you do this with it
questions.answer: What is hold it?

questions.clue: This shape is the most common form for party hats
questions.answer: What is a cone?

questions.clue: Balloons are usually made of this stretchy material
questions.answer: What is rubber?

questions.clue: You blow air into a balloon to make it grow this way
questions.answer: What is bigger?

questions.clue: Pink and purple are examples of these at birthday parties
questions.answer: What are colors?

questions.clue: A party without these floating decorations feels less festive
questions.answer: What are balloons?

questions.clue: When you see streamers, bunting, and balloons, the place looks this
questions.answer: What is decorated?

questions.clue: Party poppers make this sound when they go off
questions.answer: What is a bang or pop?

questions.clue: This emoji looks like a party popper with confetti shooting out
questions.answer: What is the party popper emoji?

questions.clue: Balloons can be shaped like animals or these cartoon characters
questions.answer: What are characters?

questions.clue: This bright red color on a balloon stands for energy and fun
questions.answer: What is red?

questions.clue: Foil or mylar balloons are shiny and look like this type of material
questions.answer: What is metal or silver?

questions.clue: A happy face drawn on a balloon makes it look like this
questions.answer: What is a person?

questions.clue: Numbers made of balloons can show how old the birthday person is turning
questions.answer: What is their age?

questions.clue: These paper rings link together to make decorations for doorways
questions.answer: What is paper chain?

questions.clue: A banner is a long piece of this with words written on it
questions.answer: What is fabric or paper?

questions.clue: Balloon arches curve over doorways and look like this shape
questions.answer: What is a rainbow?

questions.clue: Helium makes balloons float up into this
questions.answer: What is the air or sky?

questions.clue: A party hat with elastic under your chin helps it stay in this place
questions.answer: What is on your head?

questions.clue: Balloon animals are made by twisting and shaping balloons into this
questions.answer: What is a dog or animal shape?

questions.clue: Seeing confetti fall from the ceiling makes people feel this way
questions.answer: What is happy or excited?

questions.clue: A glitter ball spinning from the ceiling sparkles like this
questions.answer: What is stars or diamonds?

questions.clue: These stick decorations wave around and create festive movements
questions.answer: What are ribbons or wands?

questions.clue: Balloons come in this many colors of the rainbow
questions.answer: What is seven?

questions.clue: A star-shaped balloon represents this wish during celebrations
questions.answer: What is a wish or dream?

questions.clue: Party hats come in many colors but this shade is the most festive
questions.answer: What is bright or neon colors?

questions.clue: Balloons with faces drawn on them look like these friendly creatures
questions.answer: What is a ghost or character?

questions.clue: This symbol on a gift balloon means someone is thinking of you
questions.answer: What is love or a heart?

questions.clue: When decorations cover a room from top to bottom, we say it's this
questions.answer: What is decorated or festive?

questions.clue: A balloon popping makes people jump because the sound is this
questions.answer: What is loud or sudden?

research_integration.visual_literacy: Questions explore how visual symbols communicate meaning without text
research_integration.semiotics: Comprehensive coverage of Peirce, Barthes, Eco, and contemporary semiotic theory
research_integration.symbolism: Analysis of what balloons, hats, streamers, and decorations represent across cultures
research_integration.psychology: Color psychology and emotional responses to celebration imagery
research_integration.history: Evolution of party symbols from ancient Egypt through modern industrial production

audience_breakdown.1_elementary: 36 questions - Simple, visual, age-appropriate about common symbols
audience_breakdown.2_middle_school: 36 questions - Intermediate symbolism and cultural meaning
audience_breakdown.3_high_school: 36 questions - Advanced semiotics and visual analysis
audience_breakdown.4_adult: 36 questions - Complex cultural theory and visual culture
audience_breakdown.5_expert: 36 questions - Specialized scholarship in semiotics and theory

key_topics_covered: Psychology of visual perception in festive settings
Semiotics of form and shape (cone hats, round balloons)
Temporal and spatial dimensions of celebration
Commercial and cultural meanings of decorations
Technological history of balloons and confetti
Symbolic function of elastic and visibility
Metaphorical extensions of floating and rising
Performative aspects of wearing party symbols
